name: Cool Late Summer Borscht
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Wash beets well; trim stems and roots, leaving one inch of each. Wrap beets individually in aluminum foil and place on baking sheet.
3. Bake for 1 1/2 hours or until tender. Remove from oven and allow to cool slightly.
4. Remove skins. Coarsely grate the beets.
5. Place beets in a heavy pot. Add apple juice, water, lemon juice, and salt.
6. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to a simmer, and cook soup for 15 minutes, partially covered, skimming foam that rises to the top.
7. Remove from heat and cool to room temperature.
8. Place 2 cups yogurt in a bowl and whisk into about 3 cups of the soup.
9. Gradually whisk this mixture back into the soup pot until thoroughly combined.
10. Chill completely in the refrigerator.
11. Serve borscht in bowls garnished with a dollop of yogurt, then sprinkle with diced radishes and cucumbers.
